title: On the length of the spectral sequence of a Lie algebra extension
journal: Proceedings of the American Mathematical Society
abstract:
The length of the spectral sequence of a Lie algebra extension is at most 

  
    
      1
      +
    
    1+
  

 the dimension of the quotient algebra. We show that this bound can be attained for arbitrarily large quotient algebras even when the algebra is nilpotent and the extension splits.
